title: Colorado
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Colorado

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Colorado

You can apply for Medicaid in Colorado by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Colorado

If your small business is located in Colorado, you can use the Connect for Health Colorado website to learn more about offering your employees health coverage.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Colorado

If your employer offers SHOP health coverage in Colorado, you should contact your employer or visit the Connect for Health Colorado website for more information.

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Colorado

If you live in Colorado, you’ll use the Connect for Health Colorado website to enroll in health coverage.

CHIP in Colorado

Child Health Plan Plus covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Child Health Plan Plus right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Child Health Plan Plus in Colorado.
